locations.name: 玻利維亞
locations.summary: 玻利維亞多民族國（西班牙語：Estado Plurinacional de Bolivia），通稱玻利維亞，是位於南美洲中西部的內陸國家，與巴西、秘魯、智利、阿根廷、巴拉圭五國接壤，亦為南美洲國家聯盟的成員國；其法定首都為蘇克雷，但實際上…

locations.name: 秘鲁

relations.subject: Moustached flowerpiercer
relations.evidence: It is found in Bolivia and Peru. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist montane forests, subtropical or tropical high-altitude grassland, and heavily degraded former forest
